title: Procure 100 developer laptops for new EU office
description: We need to source 100 developer laptops for a new EU office opening in Q3 2026. Budget ceiling: EUR 200,000 total (about EUR 2,000 per unit). Must be GDPR compliant and ship from EU warehouse. Required: 32GB RAM minimum, 1TB SSD minimum, 3-year on-site warranty. Evaluate at least three vendors and recommend one. Compliance: ISO 27001 certification mandatory. Delivery: contract signed within 60 days, units delivered within 90 days of signature.
